name: minimal-toolset
description: L1 (research rank 1): minimal, well-shaped toolset. Disable rarely-used, schema-heavy tools (task, webfetch, websearch, lsp, skill, doom_loop) so the small slow model has a smaller decision surface and more free context; keep read/grep/edit/write/bash/list/glob. Uses the boolean `tools` map (removes the tool) AND a `permission` deny (hard-blocks execution) belt-and-suspenders — see docs/harness-engineering-research.md L1.
